# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

In the interest of fostering an open and welcoming community, we as contributors and maintainers commit to making participation in NukeJS a harassment-free experience for everyone.

---

## Expected Behavior

Participants should:

- Be respectful and considerate
- Use welcoming language
- Assume good intentions
- Focus on ideas, not individuals

---

## Unacceptable Behavior

Unacceptable behaviors include:

- Harassment, insults, or derogatory comments
- Personal attacks
- Discriminatory language or conduct

---

## Reporting Issues

If you experience or witness unacceptable conduct, please report it:
```
hi@kav3.com
```
Include:

- What happened
- Who was involved
- Screenshots or logs if useful

All reports will be handled with discretion and respect.

---

## Enforcement

Maintainers may:

- Warn or remove problematic content
- Block or ban users
- Take further action as needed

These actions are taken to maintain a positive community space for everyone.

---
